summary: Completed comprehensive testing of updated SOS page with new emergency features. All 9 required features are present, visible, and functional.
passed_tests: SOS page loads successfully with all emergency features
Allarme Sirena button visible and clickable (toggles between ALLARME SIRENA/FERMA SIRENA)

Condividi Posizione button visible and clickable with correct blue styling
Emergency call buttons 112, 118, 115 all visible and clickable
Add custom number button (+) visible and clickable
Torcia toggle button visible and clickable (toggles between OFF/ON states)
Sound toggle button visible and clickable (toggles between ON/OFF states)
All buttons have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Page navigation to SOS section works correctly
No error messages found on the page
